summarization.a: The chart shows the etch rate (nm/cyc) of various materials (Al2O3, HfO2, AlNx, TiN, SiO2) against the activation step duration (s).

a.question: Which aspects of this graph are being evaluated?
a.answer: They are studying the etch rate  (nm/cyc) as a function of the activation step duration (s) for the different materials used in the process (Al2O3, HfO2, AlNx, TiN, SiO2)

a.question: Do HfO2 and AlNx exhibit the same behavior?
Which material exhibit the lowest etch rate?
Could these materials be used for etching considering an activation step duration of under 5?
a.answer: No, because all materials demonstrate film deposition when activation step duration is less than 5s (2.5s for SiO2).
